fix: The four hook-written Runtime Records move out of the .excn base into .excn/runtime/ (ADR-0008); doctor reads heartbeats + viewer-server state from the new home and lists all 6 features; daemon PATH_WHITELIST serves .excn/runtime/*.json. gate-watch's Progress-Record scan relocates in EXEC-069. Commit 2badcaa (10 files). code-standards PASS (rubric sweep 5f8111f cleared the prior FAIL) + package-qa PASS.
title: Runtime Records move: hooks, doctor, and viewer-server read and write .excn/runtime/
description: Hook-written state becomes Runtime Records: the invocation heartbeat ledger, the viewer-server pid record, and gate-watch state are written to and read from .excn/runtime/. doctor heartbeat checks and the viewer-server daemon read the new home. End-to-end: a hook fires, its invocation lands in .excn/runtime/hook-invocations_progress.json, doctor reports the heartbeat from there.
acceptance_criteria: All hook scripts write their Runtime Records under .excn/runtime/
doctor reads heartbeats and viewer-server state from .excn/runtime/ and reports feature health correctly
No hook writes any *_progress.json at the .excn base
Src-First: template hook sources first, dogfood root mirrors
